meta.name: Cron Expression Parser
meta.description: Parse, validate, and explain cron schedules with field details and upcoming run times.

input.title: Cron expression
input.description: Enter a five-field Unix cron expression, or include an optional seconds field when your scheduler supports it.
input.label: Expression
input.empty: Enter a cron expression to start.
input.timezoneNote: Next run times use {timeZone} from this browser.

presets.title: Quick presets
presets.description: Start from a common schedule, then adjust the fields directly.

breakdown.title: Field breakdown
breakdown.description: Read each field from left to right to see what part of the schedule it controls.

schedule.title: Next executions
schedule.description: Preview the next 10 matching run times from the current browser time.
schedule.emptyDescription: Enter a cron expression to see its explanation, fields, and next run times.
